title: plagiobothrys collinus var. collinus
intro: Plagiobothrys collinus var. collinus, also known as wild heliotrope or collins' popcorn flower, is a perennial plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Plagiobothrys collinus var. collinus include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
